description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of light and dark exterior materials. The front facade includes a carport and a driveway, with a car parked outside, and large rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, landscaped greenery, and a patio area, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, offering privacy and security. The upper floor includes a spacious balcony with slatted railings, and the overall structure is characterized by geometric forms and a mix of textures. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents visible in the balcony and fencing.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a dark fence. The design features clean lines, geometric forms, and a mix of concrete, glass, and metal materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entrance, and large windows, with a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard pool, patio, and landscaped garden, as well as the perimeter fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, garden, patio area, and the back facade of the house with large windows and balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper balcony, side windows, and the continuation of the perimeter fence and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door under a carport, with steps leading up and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
